mapper.select:
SELECT uo.order_no AS orderNo, uo.pay_amount AS payAmount, uo.total_amount AS totalAmount, uo.quantity AS quantity, uo.created_time AS createTime, uo.status AS status,
gd.title AS dealTitle, gd.images AS dealImage, gd.original_price AS originalPrice, gd.deal_price AS dealPrice, gd.tags AS tags, gd.valid_time_desc AS validTimeDesc,
m.cover_image AS coverImage, m.name AS merchantName, m.address AS merchantAddress, m.business_hours AS businessHours, m.phone AS merchantPhone, m.longitude AS longitude, m.latitude AS latitude
FROM user_order uo LEFT JOIN group_deal gd ON uo.deal_id = gd.id LEFT JOIN merchant m ON uo.merchant_id = m.id WHERE uo.order_no = #{orderNo} AND uo.user_id = #{userId}
